condition: player.docked and player.location == "sorrow_station" and "bar_fight_done" in player.flags and player.character == "prudence" and not ("grissom_said_his_piece" in player.flags)

opens.text: He sees you and his whole body does the arithmetic of the other night — the wrist, the room, the catch that felt like a bulkhead being gentle. He doesn't leave. That's new. — I know what I said. In front of everybody. You going to file that too?

choices.text: You wanted to see wiring. You saw restraint. Note the difference.

filed.text: Yeah. Figured. — He studies the bar top a long moment. — The loader that took my contract never looked me in the eye. You keep doing it. That's the part I can't square, and I've been drinking at the problem all week. — It is not an apology. It is a man admitting the question is real. From Grissom, those are the same size.

restraint.text: Noted. — He flexes the wrist. — Hell of a filing system you've got. — He turns back to his glass, and for the first time since the loader contract, the anger sits next to him instead of in him. The Interval breathes easier for it.
